title: Alternative Methods for Earning Credit: Credit by Examination Without Prior Instruction
description: Students who already have knowledge in a subject — even without taking the class — may be able to earn academic credit by passing an examination. Conroe ISD's policy outlines who is eligible, which subjects are available, what score is required to receive credit, and how the process works. Families should be aware of this option as it can allow motivated students to move ahead in their coursework or fulfill graduation requirements more efficiently.
